tasks.title: Analyze IELTS Journey Codebase for Design Documentation
tasks.description: Perform a thorough analysis of the IELTS Journey project structure, routes, pages, existing styles, theme system, reusable components, Tailwind config, routing/state/storage logic, AI Tutor UI, study plan UI, vocabulary UI, progress UI, and settings UI to gather all necessary context for realistic design documentation creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete understanding of all website routes and pages
Documented notes on existing UI components and theme system
Identified current UX/UI problems and limitations
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive analysis notes and context ready to inform design documentation creation.

targetArtifacts: analysis notes and context for design documentation
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding for all subsequent design documentation tasks.

tasks.title: Create Redesign Overview Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/redesign-overview.md containing detailed analysis of current UX/UI problems, new design direction, product feeling, design inspiration explanation referencing the provided Dribbble concept, before/after UX goals, main design principles, target users, global product direction, reasons why current website feels basic, and what the new website should feel like. Emphasize soft, clean, modern, friendly, motivating, premium, mobile-first, personal, global, IELTS-focused design direction.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/redesign-overview.md created
Includes all required sections with clear, concise content
Design direction aligns with user prompt and inspiration
tasks.expectedResult: Redesign overview document fully describing the new design vision and rationale.

outputPlan.description: Redesign overview document with design direction and analysis

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines the overall design vision and goals for the redesign.

tasks.title: Create Information Architecture Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/information-architecture.md detailing current route and page structure, recommended new page structure, main user flows, feature grouping, page hierarchy, dashboard-first learning flow, AI Tutor entry points, study plan flow, vocabulary flow, practice flow, progress review flow, and settings flow. Ensure users always understand location, next steps, and study-exam goal connection.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/information-architecture.md created
Includes detailed current and proposed IA with user flows
Page hierarchy and feature grouping clearly documented
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive information architecture document guiding site structure and navigation.

outputPlan.description: Information architecture document with routes, flows, and hierarchy

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides clear site structure and user flow guidance for redesign.

tasks.title: Create Global Navigation Specification Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/global-navigation-spec.md specifying desktop navigation, mobile navigation, bottom navigation for mobile, header behavior, AI Tutor shortcut, user profile menu, settings access, active page states, responsive behavior, navigation labels, and navigation priority. Recommend main navigation items: Dashboard, Today, Study Plan, AI Tutor, Vocabulary, Practice, Progress, Settings.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/global-navigation-spec.md created
Includes detailed navigation behaviors and priorities
Responsive and accessibility considerations included
tasks.expectedResult: Global navigation spec document guiding consistent navigation design.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines navigation design for consistent user experience.

tasks.title: Create Shared Theme Design Tokens Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/shared-theme-design-tokens.md defining the shared theme direction and semantic design tokens for colors (background, surface, text, border, AI Tutor, IELTS skills, vocabulary, grammar, status), font sizes, font weights, spacing, border radius, shadows, z-index, breakpoints, and animation durations. Use semantic token names and describe the token system only without implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/shared-theme-design-tokens.md created
Includes comprehensive token definitions with semantic naming
Describes token system without implementation
tasks.expectedResult: Theme design tokens document providing foundation for consistent styling.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes design tokens for consistent theme and style.

tasks.title: Create Component System Specification Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/component-system-spec.md describing reusable UI components needed for the full website redesign. Include detailed specs for Button, Icon button, Card, Badge, Input, Search input, Select, Date picker, Modal, Drawer, Toast, Tabs, Progress bar, Progress ring, Empty state, Loading skeleton, Error state, Skill card, Study task card, AI Tutor message card, AI Tutor recommendation card, Vocabulary word card, Vocabulary detail panel, Practice card, Mistake card, Progress summary card, Dashboard section, Mobile bottom navigation, and Settings section card. For each component, describe purpose, visual style, states, variants, responsive behavior, accessibility notes, and usage locations. Do not create code yet.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/component-system-spec.md created
Includes detailed specs for all listed components
Accessibility and responsive behavior clearly documented
tasks.expectedResult: Comprehensive component system specification document ready for implementation.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines reusable UI components for consistent redesign implementation.

tasks.title: Create Landing Page Specification Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/pages/landing-page-spec.md specifying the landing page design. Include sections for Hero, Problem, Solution, AI Tutor, Daily study roadmap, Vocabulary learning, Progress tracking, Browser extension support, Mobile/PWA support, and Call to action. Document page purpose, user goals, current UX/UI problems, proposed layout, main sections, primary and secondary actions, empty/loading/error states, mobile layout, responsive behavior, AI Tutor integration, accessibility notes, components needed, data displayed, and design notes inspired by the reference.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/design/pages/landing-page-spec.md created
Includes all required sections and detailed page spec
Design notes reflect inspiration and user goals
tasks.expectedResult: Landing page specification document ready for redesign implementation.

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines detailed landing page design for user conversion and engagement.

tasks.title: Create Implementation Plan Documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/design/implementation-plan.md describing how to implement the redesign later. Include recommended implementation order, files likely to change, components likely to create, theme system changes needed, page-by-page implementation plan, testing checklist, risks, and things not to change yet. Emphasize this is a plan only and no implementation is done now.
